violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Inspector observed wrong chemical attached to the sanitizer line. After PIC and inspector bled line, primed sanitizer, and ran dish machine, concentration remained 0ppm. PIC called for service; technician scheduled for this evening. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
Debris and leaf litter observed behind the dumpsters. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machine. Inspector provided during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Dumpster covered during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
Walk-in cooler door is in poor repair; observed not closing properly and partial gasket missing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package in the kitchen. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024
The ice machine was not in good repair, observed leak. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
Walk-in cooler door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fan (dish area) have an accumulation of dust and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

A hose is connected to the faucet at the ware-washing area. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
The prep sink is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

The floors behind three bay sink have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
The ceiling in the ware-washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2024
